description:
Extraordinarily soft and smooth, our ImpossiblySoft fabric feels made for all-day motion. This double-knit crew is built with clean lines and sweat-wicking Dri-FIT technology for the ultimate comfort on the go.

Benefits

  • Nike Dri-FIT technology moves sweat away from your skin for quicker evaporation, helping you stay dry and comfortable.

name: Crew-Neck Golf Crew-Neck
description:
We obsessed over the material and fit of this golf jumper to help you stay warm without sacrificing a stitch of style or function. As smooth as your swing, the merino-cashmere blend is lightweight and naturally breathable. The refined neckline and engineered knit construction provide a sophisticated look that's as comfortable on the first tee as it is on the 19th hole.

Product Details

description:

name: Dri-FIT ADV Running Vest
description:
You've pushed through the worst to compete with the best. So let the ultra-breathable feel of our AeroSwift vest take you across the finishing line. Designed for racing, this lightweight and smooth top uses our most innovative technologies so you can focus on beating your personal bests.

Race hard

Nike Dri-FIT ADV technology combines moisture-wicking fabric with advanced engineering and features to help you stay dry and comfortable. Data from real runners like you was used to place open holes throughout the fabric, providing targeted ventilation where you need it most.

Improved fit

A lower hem compared with previous AeroSwift vests offers extra coverage. Bonded seams at the armhole and collar help give a slimmer feel to reduce chafing.

Innovative Speed

The AeroSwift Collection is Nike's pinnacle racing gear. It's made for speed using the latest innovations to deliver optimal performance and distraction-free coverage. Streamlined designs are lightweight and sleek, helping you move freely as you finish strong.

More benefits

The Swoosh logos have a non-reflective design finish to protect against flash photography during the race.

Product details

  • 100% polyester

  • Machine wash

  • Imported

  • Colour Shown: Steam/Black

  • Style: FN4231-006

name: Dri-FIT Running Miler
description:
Run without limits. Built with our sweat-wicking tech, this lightweight and breathable Miler tank helps keep you cool and dry mile after mile. It's elevated with the collection's signature reflective design bars to help brighten up your gear.

Benefits

  • Nike Dri-FIT technology moves sweat away from your skin for quicker evaporation, helping you stay dry and comfortable.

  • Lightweight knit fabric is breathable and comfortable.

Product Details

  • Side vents on the hem

  • 100% polyester

  • Machine wash

  • Imported

  • Not intended for use as Personal Protective Equipment (PPE)

  • Colour Shown: White

name: Aero-FIT Running Stride
description:
Air conditioning through extraordinary airflow, engineered for your run.

When you run in Nike Aero-FIT technology, you run with extraordinary airflow. Enhanced with our most innovative cooling tech, this lightweight top offers elevated breathability with every mile.

Aero-FIT Cooling Tech

Nike Aero-FIT technology is designed for maximum breathability. It allows airflow against your skin to help you stay cool when your run heats up.

Elevated Construction

Lightweight knit fabric features strategically placed mesh zones on the front and back, allowing air to flow through the fabric as you run.

Freedom to Move

Side hem vents allow for unrestricted movement.

Product Details

  • 100% polyester

  • Machine wash

  • Imported

  • Colour Shown: Black/Light Green Spark
